document.source_title: IPL 2026 DC vs RR: ‘Starc’s work ethic, preparation with his own plans, training are above par’, says Badani

claims.claim_text: Starc's work ethic and preparation are above par.
claims.evidence_text: His work ethic, his preparation with his own plans, and his training are above par.

claims.claim_text: Starc is a match-winner for Delhi Capitals.
claims.evidence_text: We’ve invested in him and we know that he’s a match-winner.

claims.claim_text: Delhi Capitals struggled at home this season.
claims.evidence_text: We primarily struggled at home. Add in last year, and we have four wins here from 12 games.
